calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-15-2010 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar May-27-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

John F. Vannucci, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Todd David Korab, who was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Jay Lawrence Miller.
Default was entered against defendant on September 10, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed on March 22, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Todd David Korab, and against the Defaulted Defendant Jay Lawrence Miller as follows:

Damages/Principal - $113,000.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $23,830.00.
Costs - $415.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $137,245.00.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
